params._feeRecipient: Initial address to receive platform fees

params.milestoneAmounts: Array of per-milestone amounts (wei or token units)
params.tokenAddress: ERC-20 token address, or address(0) for ETH

returns.escrowAddress: Address of the newly deployed GigEscrow

createEscrow(address,address,address,uin.notice: Deploy a new GigEscrow contract for a gig

getAllEscrows().notice: Get all escrow addresses deployed by this factory

owner().notice: Owner of the factory (acts as arbitrator for all deployed escrows)

setFeeRecipient(address).notice: Update the platform fee recipient address

transferOwnership(address).notice: Transfer factory ownership (and arbitrator rights) to a new address
